command:
echo "=== DEEP DIVE — vm-hermes ==="
echo "--- all systemd services ---"
systemctl list-unit-files --type=service | grep -iE "hermes|sakura|bot|telegram"
echo "--- all user services ---"
ls /etc/systemd/system/ | grep -iE "hermes|sakura|bot"
ls /home/jose/.config/systemd/user/ 2>/dev/null
echo "--- hermes binary ---"
which hermes 2>/dev/null || find /usr/local/bin /home/jose -name "hermes" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -5
echo "--- hermes install ---"
ls /home/jose/.hermes/ 2>/dev/null
ls /home/jose/ 2>/dev/null
echo "--- npm global packages ---"
ls /home/jose/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/ 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "--- any service files ---"
find /etc/systemd /home/jose -name "*.service" 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "--- journalctl all recent ---"
journalctl -n 30 --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -30
echo "--- disk space ---"
df -h / 2>/dev/null
